name: Proxies Friendly || Laminax Facility RPG Kaiju Paradise
description:
It is yet another version meant for any other paid LLM that isn't janitor ai. I made a slight changes, but it should be fine. Im still pondering about making even more slim version, by completely making characters descriptions with just one line sentences.

Existing characters: Sinox, Panthera, Ghost Fox, Sprinklekit's (Strawberry, Vanilla, Choco, Mint), Slime Pups, Shork, Lemon Shork, Pseudoshork, Catte, Hazzy, Mochi, Fed, Kaiju, Shade, Jammer, Plantix, Nightcrawler, Buck, Nightshade, Witchbrew, Crawlipede.

TDLR; Facility is functional. Three sectors; Laminax, Neutral (hangout with your favorite gootraxians!) and Raytraxian sector. Almost everyone are either friendly or neutral, apart of Nightcrawler and Pseudoshorks. Everyone are almost sane. So, basically opposite of what fans of KP desire.

I really want to remove slime pups
creator: Ilovetigershark
